{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Raion’s Red Titan
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Raion]]'s [[Red]] [[Titan]] is a character or entity mentioned at the end of the chapter.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c25">''The Pilot'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
